Never stop
discovering.

Choose from Europe’s largest fleet of premium RIBs [rigid inflatable boats], and set out on an adventure to discover the hidden treasures of the Greek seas.

Rigid Inflatable Boats

Rigid Inflatable Boats (RIBs) are light-weight, high performance boats constructed with a solid hull, and inflatable tubes around the outer edge.

The addition of inflatable tubes to the solid hull increases the shock-absorbing qualities of the vessel, giving it a hull that can essentially change shape under the impact of waves.

This design makes RIBs incredibly versatile, stable, seaworthy and durable boats.

Close

Explore more

RIB charter on the Greek archipelago.

With more than 3000 islands full of surprising and exuberant contrasts, Greece is the Mediterranean’s greatest treasure trove of picturesque jewels just waiting to be discovered. Start your journey from the mainland, reaching new and exciting destinations each day, or complement your stay on a single island with a RIB — to escape the crowds and gain access to the most remote hideaways.

Learn more

Events & adventures.

The Greek seas are our playground

From the gentle waters of the Ionian Sea to the charming Saronic Gulf and the windswept Aegean, we can organise the most memorable and rewarding of experiences. We’re seasoned seafarers and RIB enthusiasts, managing every event with the utmost care — no matter how large or small. Our privately-owned fleet of more than 30 power boats is fast, safe, versatile and ready to thrill.

Learn more

Our Services.

So much more than just chartering

Besides RIB chartering, we offer a full range of services from sales, storage, repair and maintenance to our very own assembly line. We are an authorised Mercury Marine® dealer and service centre, plus, thanks to our 10-year strong naval architecture background, we can even design and build a RIB from scratch.

Learn more
Established 2008

This is OpenSea.

OpenSea is the leading provider of private and commercial RIB charter, RIB hire and bareboat RIB rental services in Greece. Since 2008, we have been providing RIBs both for individual reservations and leisure groups, as well as for business and corporate events.

About us

Certifications & Code of Practice

We operate following the codes of practice of the world's most prominent maritime and standardisation organisations:
International Maritime Organization
Royal Yachting Association
Maritime and Coastguard Agency
